hook: An existing Northern Ontario business can get up to $1 million to expand - as a loan, a grant, or a mix of both
OpenAI just retracted its own recommendation for a popular AI coding benchmark - after finding 30 percent of its tasks were broken
A European telecom giant says its AI tool usage is up 546 percent since the start of the year
There is a $20,000 grant built specifically to help Northwestern Ontario businesses adopt AI
A Canadian government just used AI to review 466 million lines of code in 20 hours - work it says would have taken six years by hand.
A global energy company just proved the AI lesson every local operation should copy
HP just expanded its AI partnership across three parts of the business: customer service, software development, and operations
There is a FedNor program built specifically to fund AI adoption and scale-up in Northern Ontario
Anthropic just said it wants to develop its own drugs. That is not the strangest AI story this week.
The #1 AI mistake small businesses make.
Your custom software might be a 35% tax refund.
AI won't replace you. A business using it might.
There's federal money to adopt AI up here.
5 things a Northwest business can actually use AI for today.
